title: Minecraft Revamped
description:
This Modpack is my personal approach how Minecraft can be made fun to play again.

Modpack is made with Vanilla + feel and fixing most minecraft problems in mind
body:
INFO:
I'm now focused on changing modloader from fabric to quilt for further performance improvement.
New Beta version coming as soon as one mod will fix its compatibility with Quilt. Love yall <3

This Modpack is my personal approach how Minecraft can be made fun to play again.

Modpack is made with Vanilla + feel and fixing most minecraft problems in mind 

What is changed?

-Performance thanks to genius mod autors is multiplied by lot.

-Create mod as an major expansion of existing redstone system.

-Fight system is changed making fights much more fun, rewarding  with a lot of new weapons that mostly fit in vanilla+ vibe in my opinion.

-More structures are added, villages and a lot of vanilla structures are revamped BUT much less structures generate making minecraft feeling a lot more empty as in old minecraft days.

-Very big amount of new blocks(new variants of existing blocks and some furniture)

-Collosal amount of QoL changes like double doors opening together etc

-Graphic revamp of minecraft thanks to mods and resource packs where original feeling is i think kept

-All mobs have new variants, animations and a bit harder to fight

-New biomes that really fit with existing ones

-Minimap in a very Minecraft feel

-Everything sounds better thanks to new sound engine and ambient sounds

-Low End PC's friendly thanks to optimization

I hope u will have as much fun as i have playing this modpack.
Love y'all and feel free to write suggestions
